rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (10th-11th arr.); Bastille/Canal Saint-Martin €1,200-1,600; central 1st-8th €1,600-2,500

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; Paris utilities moderate; internet ~€35/mo

groceries.note: home cooking; Monoprix / Franprix / Lidl; local markets affordable for produce

transit.note: Navigo monthly pass ~€75 covers all Paris metro/bus/RER zones

simData.note: SIM-only plan (Free/Orange/Bouygues) unlimited data; France has competitive mobile pricing

misc.note: gym (~€35), toiletries, entertainment, museum passes, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Paris medium-term furnished lets stable year-round; summer tourist pressure minor for long-term.

evidence.claim: Paris digital nomad monthly budget range
evidence.quote: Digital nomads should budget between €2,300 and €3,800 per month to live comfortably in Paris in 2026

Central Paris (1st to 8th arrondissements) ranges from €1,600 to €2,500 per month for a furnished one-bedroom, while the Canal Saint-Martin and Bastille areas (10th to 11th arrondissements) are €1,200 to €1,600
A metro pass in Paris costs around €75 per month
Coworking spaces or hot desks cost €150 to €350 per month
